column1: # Title: Detailed industry coefficient in Hong Kong

# Description: Input-output data are calculated based on historical energy consumption sourced from Hong Kong energy annual statistics report and energy end-use data. The energy consumption data could not be used directly due to the inconsistency between IEA data(used in GCAM) and Hong Kong's energy statistics
column2: so the energy consumption share was used to allocate. The shares are estimated by ChatGPT Advanced Thinking model
